UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's public-facing profile information.

photoURL.description: URL of the user's profile picture.

Asset.title: Asset
Asset.description: Represents a single financial or tangible asset owned by a user.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this asset.

name.description: The common name or description of the asset (e.g., 'Apple Stock').

currentValue.description: The current estimated monetary value of the asset.

acquisitionDate.description: The date when the asset was acquired.

notes.description: Optional additional notes about the asset.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated.

InventoryAsset.title: Inventory Asset
InventoryAsset.description: Represents a single asset within a module's inventory.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores public profile information for each user.

/users/{userId}/assets/{assetId}.description: Stores the collection of assets owned by a specific user.

/modules/{moduleId}/inventory_list/{inve.description: Stores the collection of inventory assets for a specific module.
